title: Vegan Golden Brownie Halwa
description: A sweet, crumbly Indian (Maharashtrian) dessert made with brown sugar, cashews, and a touch of ghee for a perfect energy boost in the morning.

ingredients.name: 1 cup vegan brown sugar
ingredients.notes: Use granulated sugar as a substitute.

ingredients.name: 2/3 cup ghee or vegan butter
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is at room temperature for easier spreading.

instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a small pan or mold.
In a medium saucepan, combine brown sugar and water. Stir until the sugar is fully dissolved. Add ghee and salt, stirring well to prevent sticking.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat. Once boiling, reduce the heat to low and simmer for about 20 minutes or until it thickens into a golden syrup-like consistency.
Add in chopped cashews and stir continuously until they are fully incorporated and the mixture coats the back of a spoon well.
Transfer the halwa from the pan to a greased mold. Let it cool completely before serving.
